name: smitmartijn--whatpulse-ai-agent-skill
description: Query WhatPulse computer usage statistics using natural language. Keystrokes, mouse activity, application screen time, network bandwidth, website tracking, uptime, and profiles. Reads the local WhatPulse SQLite database in strict read-only mode. Triggers: "whatpulse", "keystrokes", "mouse distance", "app usage", "screen time", "bandwidth", "computer stats", "typing stats"
